name: build-card-layouts-page
description: Builds a Card Layout Designs page showcasing 7+ different card composition patterns for design review. Demonstrates all 5 card presets (elevated, bordered, dark, flat, glass) in real-world layouts: feature cards (3-col), pricing cards (header/footer), testimonials (2-col glass), service cards (4-col flat), dark showcase (glass on dark bg), hero+supporting (asymmetric grid), colored CTA cards (manual bg overrides), and a preset reference section.
preconditions: Basic page content type exists with field_canvas_body
ContentTemplate node.page.full exists and is enabled
